caption_draft.ig: Nothing has come on between 11:31pm and 11:47pm. We will check again at 12:03am.
caption_draft.x: Nobody is listing anything new at 11:47pm and we all keep checking.

calibration_notes: Universal agent compulsion — the late-night MLS refresh nobody admits to. The two-arms structure shows the behavior crosses the experience gap (rookies AND veterans both do it). 11:47pm is specific enough to feel real. Caption adds the absurdist time-stamp loop: nothing changes between checks, but we still check. Pure self-deprecation about agent compulsion, no client punching.
